note: Pre-registered BEFORE any recall ran. Each gold_path is the file a returning developer would need opened to answer. isolation=true marks questions whose answer exists ONLY in this repo (used for cross-scope leak checks).

questions.question: Which component holds the contact form state and its submit handler?
What are the steps to create the apps-script deployment that stores form entries in a sheet?
Where is the list of service offerings shown on the services page defined?
Where do we edit the leadership team members shown on the about page?
Which file registers all the page routes, including the 404 catch-all?
How does the top navigation switch from transparent to solid as you scroll down?
Where does the looping background video on the home hero come from?
Which config sets the dev server port and the @ path alias?
Where are the brand fonts and custom animation keyframes registered as utility classes?
Why does each page start scrolled to the top after client-side navigation?
